observation.summary: Architecture docs, migration docs, and roadmap changes are observed through path-scoped CI.

hypothesis.summary: A doc change can introduce stale boundary wording or break executable SSOT links.

execution.summary: Run the architecture verifier and all architecture tool tests.

evaluation.summary: The verifier fails on missing required files, stale wording, dependency drift, or failed tool tests.

retrospective.summary: Closed decisions move into owning SSOT docs; unresolved shared decisions stay in the roadmap.

evidence.proves: architecture docs remain executable and linked to tool checks
